Actions.Text: REFERRED TO ALCOHOLISM AND DRUG ABUSE

Title: Reforms the opioid settlement board to provide services and supports to grieving families
Summary: Reforms the opioid settlement board to provide services and supports to grieving families and include board members who lost a child, sibling, parent or close family member to substance use disorder.
LawCode: Amd §25.18, Ment Hyg L; amd §99-nn, St Fin L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the mental hygiene law and the state finance law, in relation to overhauling the opioid settlement fund
